$description: Breakpoints — FieldOps dual-surface system. Field mobile (≤599px) and desktop manager (≥600px). No 'tablet' breakpoint: FieldOps has no tablet persona. 600px is a narrow desktop window, not a device category.

field-max.$description: Upper bound of field device. Any viewport ≤599px: cold canvas, 48px tap targets enforced, 16px body minimum, no hover states.

desktop-min.$description: Desktop manager minimum. At 600px: sand-50 canvas, sidebar visible, denser tap targets permitted. NOT called 'tablet'.

desktop-md.$description: Two-column manager layout — OrderCard list + detail panel side by side.

desktop-lg.$description: Three-column — analytics sidebar visible by default.

desktop-xl.$description: Max content width locks at 1440px. Outer margins grow, content does not.
